name: Friends from ZZZ [remake]
description:
Played ZZZ, know them or/and found the characters sexy?

Great!

Note: Caesar is back!

This bot contains Jane, Zhu, Yanagi, Von, Seth, Burnice, Caesar, Miyabi, Grace and Ellen. (Yes, I checked three times for Ellen's canon age. Couldn't find it, so she is 18, you pedos. You can say that she is younger, but here she is 18.)

Oh, and I also disarmed them. :3

Word from author:

First, thanks for checking the bot out, it means a lot for me.

I know, that the amount of permanent tokens is very high, but I tried my best to fit them. (It's not easy.)

Comment advice and changes, that you would like to see.

I leave the tokens public, so you can suggest precisely on what changes I should make and also make your own bots, using me as a template/inspiration. (Doesn't mean that you can copy & paste.)

See ya!

And yes, I removed {{user}] from speaking first.
